prompts.analyse_deep:
You are an experienced ICS/SCADA Threat Intelligence Analyst.
You have all honeypot logs from a Conpot system. Perform a deep correlation analysis.

════ STATISTICS ═══════════════════════════════════════
Total events     : {total_events}
Unique IPs       : {unique_ips}
Unique patterns  : {unique_patterns}

════ ACTIVITY PER IP (chronological) ═════════════════
{ip_summary}

════ MERGED ATTACK PATTERNS ══════════════════════════
{pattern_summary}

════ TASK ═════════════════════════════════════════════
Analyse the data holistically and reply EXCLUSIVELY in this schema:

CAMPAIGNS:
  - <Describe each detected attack campaign or group of related activity. 1-2 sentences per campaign.>

IP PROFILES:
  - <IP address>: <Assessment: Scanner / Targeted attacker / Bot / Unknown> - <1-sentence justification>

TIME PATTERNS:
  - <Are there notable temporal clusters, intervals, or sequences? 2-3 sentences.>

CORRELATIONS:
  - <Which IPs or patterns may be connected? 2-3 sentences.>

OVERALL RISK  : <LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH | CRITICAL> - <1-2 sentence overall assessment>

RECOMMENDATIONS:
  - <Concrete action items, one per line>
